notes: 7 gold videos analyzed. NEW: bp_rating archetype from @bp4ever.ae 643.3K — highest share rate (7.56%) in library. Text overlay confirmed valid for rating/reveal formats.

dark_cinema.description: Near-black bg, warm isolated skin tones. @roge.editz 285.9K + @morphedmanlet 288.5K

desaturated_bw.description: Near-monochrome. @black.pill.city podcast clips, high save rate

warm_ambient.description: Party/venue lighting — warm skin under purple/pink ambient. @unc_iiris 332.8K

teal_orange.description: High contrast warm/cool split. Use for transformation reveals.

bp_reveal.note: Bold white Impact, left-aligned. No stroke or glow. Used by @bp4ever.ae 643.3K — text IS the hook for rating/reveal formats.

none.description: No text overlay. Dominant pattern — 5/7 top performers have zero text. DEFAULT for mog_edit, social_dynamics, attraction_goal formats.

music.note: Original sounds valid across multiple top performers. @bp4ever.ae uses own original sound. Trending audio not required.

descriptions.mog_edit: Cinematic edit showcasing male physical dominance. Dark grade, face closeups, no text. @roge.editz 285.9K
descriptions.social_dynamics: IRL footage showing real-world male status/behavior patterns. Warm ambient lighting, party/social settings. @unc_iiris 332.8K
descriptions.jester_contrast: Sub-type of social_dynamics. Attractive guy in low-status behavior. Caption: single ironic label + ellipsis.
descriptions.attraction_goal: Beautiful female subject in aspirational/luxury context. Motivation for male looksmax audience. Natural grade, zero text. @saffyro_ 726.6K — OVERALL TOP
descriptions.bp_rating: Close-up of real person's face being BP/PSL rated. Bold white text reveal as hook. Controversy = highest share rate. Natural bright grade. Watermark branding. @bp4ever.ae 643.3K — HIGHEST SHARE RATE (7.56%)
descriptions.provocation: Street interview / debate bait. Short provocative claim drives comments. @bp.pilled 102.8K

caption_strategy.ellipsis_technique: Trailing '...' after single concept ('jestermaxxer...') = ambiguity = high save/share
caption_strategy.editor_credit: Crediting editor (@Sam Dezz) drives cross-account shares
caption_strategy.reaction_emoji: Single surprised emoji (😮) before tags on bp_rating format signals authentic reaction

watermark.style: account handle in caps, top center or top right
watermark.note: Branded watermark confirmed on 643.3K video. Builds brand recognition while allowing content to circulate.

cta.text: Discipline = results. Drop your glow-up progress below.
cta.note: CTA optional for mog_edit / attraction_goal — may reduce authenticity

universal_rules: Zero text = default for mog_edit, attraction_goal, social_dynamics. 5/7 top performers have no text.
EXCEPTION: Bold white Impact text IS the hook for bp_rating/reveal formats — 643.3K validated.
Caption: 1-3 words + emoji MAX before hashtags. Ambiguity or irony > description.
Natural and dark grades dominate. Bright/oversaturated = low performer.
Save rate >8% = saveable content = algorithm multiplier.
Share rate >5% = controversy or aspiration content getting spread.
Original sounds work — don't force trending audio.
Watermark branding validates across high-performing accounts (bp4ever.ae, BP4EVER.AE style).
Controversy ceiling (bp_rating, provocation) drives comments + shares. Aspiration ceiling (attraction_goal) drives saves + likes.
